title: New GPT-3 capabilities: Edit & insert
summary: We’ve released new versions of GPT-3 and Codex which can edit or insert content into existing text, rather than just completing existing text.
summaryZh: 我们发布了新版本的GPT-3和Codex ，它们可以编辑内容或将内容插入到现有文本中，而不仅仅是完成现有文本。
highlights: We’ve released new versions of GPT-3 and Codex which can edit or insert content into existing text, rather than just completing existing text.
highlightsZh: 我们发布了新版本的GPT-3和Codex ，它们可以编辑内容或将内容插入到现有文本中，而不仅仅是完成现有文本。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Lessons learned on language model safety and misuse
titleZh: 关于语言模型安全性和滥用的经验教训
summary: We describe our latest thinking in the hope of helping other AI developers address safety and misuse of deployed models.
summaryZh: 我们描述我们的最新想法，希望帮助其他人工智能开发人员解决部署模型的安全性和滥用问题。
highlights: We describe our latest thinking in the hope of helping other AI developers address safety and misuse of deployed models.
highlightsZh: 我们描述我们的最新想法，希望帮助其他人工智能开发人员解决部署模型的安全性和滥用问题。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Economic impacts research at OpenAI
summary: Call for expressions of interest to study the economic impacts of large language models.
